---
title: "(α)typicalquant"
listing:
  - id: talks
    contents: talks
    max-items: 3
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
  - id: thoughts
    contents: thoughts
    max-items: 3
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
---

Welcome to (α)typicalquant, [my](about.qmd "About Me") personal website.

[**Important Disclaimer:**]{.underline} All views on (α)typicalquant are my own and are not reflective of the views of my employer or any other organization I am affiliated with. The content of this website is intended for informational purposes only and does not represent investment advice or solicitation for investment.

# What You'll Find on (α)typicalquant

## About

Learn more [About](about.qmd) me.

## Talks

Details about my speaking engagements are on the [Talks](talks.qmd) page. A few of my upcoming and recent are listed here:

::: {#talks}
:::

## Thoughts

I have collected articles of interest on the [Thoughts](thoughts.qmd) page. Here are a few recent posts:

::: {#thoughts}
:::

## Tools

A variety of [Tools](tools.qmd) that I built are available to try out.

# Acknowledgements

<hr>

This website was built with Quarto. To learn more visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.

<hr>

```{=html}
Navbar image credit: “<a href="https://www.flickr.com/photos/nasawebbtelescope/55118095230" title="NASA Reveals New Details About Dark Matter’s Influence on Universe">NASA Reveals New Details About Dark Matter’s Influence on Universe</a>” by <a href="https://www.flickr.com/photos/nasawebbtelescope/">NASA's James Webb Space Telescope</a>, <a href="https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/deed.en" rel="license noopener noreferrer">CC BY 4.0</a>
```
